implement.detail: SECURITY served-app edit mode (admins only) - a thin H1-gated FRONT-END, no new capability logic or endpoints. Opt-in edit switch shown ONLY when H2 admin===true (detect-then-ask BINDING: the only setEditMode(true) is the explicit opt-in click; the whoami effect sets only admin). Edit request -> scoped FOLLOW-UP BUILD via POST /api/v1/jobs {artifactId} with the admin platform Bearer (H1 re-gates: can(canEditApps)+loadWritable, uniform 404) -> job-status POLL to a terminal state (authoritative, transient-tolerant) -> preview (new head vs pre-run head) -> APPROVE or one-click guardedRollback. Admin-discovery discreet dismissible banner (never auto-enables). edit-mode.js fetch-injectable controller + panel phase machine; visitor-blind POST /api/app-assistant untouched (separate plane). Diagram 04 updated

test.detail: apps+contract lane 559 pass then edit-mode/panel 51 pass after the codex-fix (25 edit-mode incl. M1 poll + M2 guardedRollback, 6 panel H3 block); tsc(src+test) clean, chokepoint clean, panel asset compiles (242378B). Panel-only slice - shared/ untouched (reused jobs+versions/restore), so the full-lane other suites are unaffected. Detect-then-ask pinned by an effect-slicing test (not a tautology); the drive asserts POST /jobs with artifactId+Bearer; visitor-blindness asserted (confirmEdit references no /api/app-assistant)

securityWall.detail: gitleaks clean; chokepoint clean; the served bundle carries edit mode + the rollback-guard copy and NO provider token (grep clean); NO new capability/permission logic (H1 is the sole authority - a non-admin force-enabling the UI drives nothing the server accepts: /jobs + versions/restore re-gate server-side); admin Bearer read defensively (cross-origin/sandbox swallowed), sent only same-origin, never logged

liveVerification.detail: COMPOSED live proof (no fresh build burned - justified): every edit-mode network call is unit-proven against real-shaped fakes AND its server surfaces are already live-proven - the follow-up-build patch run + its gates by H1's live probe (admin drives /jobs, user 403s) + E2/F2, and versions/restore by the D-series/prior slices. Smoke: the rebuilt panel-runtime asset (served on the stack) contains edit mode + guardedRollback + the rollback-guard PT-PT copy, egress-clean. DEFERRED (landing follow-up): a browser walkthrough of a real admin edit->preview->rollback (the flow orchestration is fetch-unit-proven; the machinery is live-proven; a fresh real-patch-run build would be largely redundant)

freshReview.detail: VERDICT: APPROVE (slices/H3/review-verdict.md) - fresh-context security+UX review: detect-then-ask holds, server is the authority (client gate cosmetic), edit mode visually distinct, PT-PT clean, graceful degradation

codexSliceReview.detail: gpt-5.4/5.5 read-only: first pass NEEDS-WORK with 2 Mediums, both real, both fixed in 1901055 - (M1) an early SSE close read as 'no change' while a build could deploy an edit moments later -> now polls GET /jobs/:id to a terminal status before previewing; (M2) rollback used a stale preRunSha with no head guard, wiping concurrent changes -> guardedRollback re-reads versions and restores only if HEAD is still this edit's head AND the target still exists, else refuses with a calm PT-PT message. Codex re-review (slices/H3/codex-review-2.md): both CLOSED with file:line, poll loop bounded, rollback fails closed, detect-then-ask + visitor-blindness intact. VERDICT: APPROVE

designAudit.detail: edit mode is visually DISTINCT from the visitor OPERAR/MOSTRAR/ENSINAR modes (dedicated section, left accent bar, tinted surface, 'Modo de edição (administrador)' header); accessible switch (role=switch aria-checked); PT-PT throughout, no emoji, no em/en-dash; the discovery banner is discreet + dismissible. Fresh reviewer covered the UX dimension in the APPROVE

walkthrough.detail: asset-serves smoke (edit mode + guardedRollback in the served bundle, egress-clean) + the composed live proof above; a full browser walkthrough is a documented landing follow-up
